# 新闻速递 2026-04-11

## MercadoLibre
- Prime Capital Advisors增持MercadoLibre股份，表明机构对公司前景看好，或提升市场信心。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Fiduciary Alliance LLC购入734股MercadoLibre股票，显示机构认可其价值，或带来轻微积极影响。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizAFBVV95cUxQZk1kdHpBUGV6QXExNllJUWlocHJLTkFtd0h2YXY0MXQ1a2hxdk15QmVUczU0bkZSY0hidlN5VFlRYkVUYzl1eFM0V2Q4M1haZW1CeGF6NjhsZzQ0ZWh4Qy1XZG9DV3puMEVhM2ZESjBDdXBxQndOQ1MzTk1DaXlKSUxoZUxmYkdCQnEtUE9FY3FxVzlYM05BSV8yY21NSzROdnp0SnFMOHhfb0lndWV1TVNKMS0wbW9MUFhSQWN1OUlmTW9pREtqMlljUmY?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre拟将数字货币从Mercado Coin转向Meli Dolar，此举或重塑其金融科技战略，影响市场竞争力。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## AppLovin
- AppLovin拓展电商业务，此举有望开启新的增长引擎，促进收入多元化及长期价值提升。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxQZVRNZlJhTXFrU244Tl9DZTFIUWlIZnFqQjR5aUM5cmxIZmYzSkJrYkJMbkVYWVhGMmJvMVlBaGtqMXRSbzNJamM5MzkzQjVCTTdmdFJoV2p0eFBaa1M5Z1lUUjRGUGFPdW5pTURsMmcxcTVEUzRXdElRZVpndGtCY0IwYUk2bEF3ZVlaU0M5YkZmcjFucnZ4ampCYWJuR0hXa2pB?oc=5)）
